name: Sprunki Island Survival Shooting
description: Youre stranded on an island, facing an invasion of Sprunki determined to destroy you. Arm yourself with two guns and fight back! Eliminate the Sprunki before they overwhelm you. Survival depends on your shooting skills and quick thinking. Defend yourself and endure against the relentless Sprunki attack! Website Dev: <a href='https://www.crazygamesonline.com/'>https://www.crazygamesonline.com/</a>
instructions: Mouse click or tap to play
tags: First Person Shooter, Mentolatux, Shooting, Sprunki, survival, Unity3D, WebGL
